describe any material changes to those operations, such as changes to technologies used or to personnel responsibilities;

describe and assess the effectiveness of the Administration in responding to disasters during that fiscal year, including a description of the number and amounts of loans made for damage and for economic injury; and
describe the plans of the Administration for preparing to respond to disasters during the next fiscal year.
